backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Topper Ignite logo image is used in the Footer component's brand logo area, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-2.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key contents of each component.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Topper Ignite app, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by composing Navbar, Hero, Stats, Videos, About, and Footer sections with smooth-scroll anchor IDs.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying the channel's mission text, a 13-chapter CBSE syllabus list, and a 4-card features grid highlighting teaching philosophy and benefits.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Topper Ignite logo image, social links (YouTube/Instagram), smooth-scroll quick links, a topics-covered list, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background banner image, animated gradient orbs, the channel name in fire-gradient text, a tagline, and CTA buttons linking to YouTube and the videos section.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed responsive navigation bar with the Topper Ignite logo image, smooth-scroll nav links, a YouTube subscribe button, and an animated mobile hamburger dropdown menu.
frontend/src/components/Stats.tsx: Statistics section rendering a responsive 2×2/4-column grid of cards showing key channel metrics (students, videos, chapters, rating) with branded icon highlights.
frontend/src/components/Videos.tsx: Renders a grid of Class 12 math chapter video cards with YouTube thumbnail previews that switch to embedded iframes on play, plus external link buttons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS that imports Poppins/Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the dark energetic site theme and brand colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH brand colors, Poppins/Inter font families, border radii, accordion animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including existing features and pending action requests, specifically for adding the Topper Ignite logo to the Navbar and Footer components.
